name: Keyboards
description: Mechanical, low-profile, and hot-swap boards built for daily writing — not for tournaments.

name: Mice
description: Pointing devices with restraint. Quiet clicks, honest shapes, low-latency wireless.

name: Headsets
description: Over-ear cans tuned for voices and music — wired and wireless.

name: Microphones
description: Desktop USB mics for calls, streams, and clean voice capture.

name: Speakers
description: Compact desk speakers with warmth and presence — no subwoofer required.

name: Accessories
description: Mats, wrist rests, and the small things that finish a desk.
